Task1.name: Task 1: Extract Shared Code into shared.js
Task1.description: Task 1: Extract Shared Code into shared.js

T001.name: Create shared.js with extracted utilities (keyboard, MIDI, audio, chord detection, pitch class matching)
T001.description: Create shared.js with extracted utilities (keyboard, MIDI, audio, chord detection, pitch class matching)

T002.name: Verify the existing arpeggiator still works - open index.html and confirm keyboard renders and MIDI input works
T002.description: Verify the existing arpeggiator still works - open index.html and confirm keyboard renders and MIDI input works

T004.name: Create chord database with 4 difficulty tiers (beginner triads, all triads, seventh chords, extended chords) and common progressions
T004.description: Create chord database with 4 difficulty tiers (beginner triads, all triads, seventh chords, extended chords) and common progressions

Task3.name: Task 3: Create the Game HTML Page (game.html)
Task3.description: Task 3: Create the Game HTML Page (game.html)

T006.name: Create game.html with HUD (score, lives, level), challenge area, feedback overlay, piano keyboard, start screen with tier selection, and game over screen
T006.description: Create game.html with HUD (score, lives, level), challenge area, feedback overlay, piano keyboard, start screen with tier selection, and game over screen

T008.name: Create game.css with styles for HUD, challenge area, feedback overlay, keyboard highlights (target/correct/wrong/pressed), start/game-over screens, and animations (pulse, flash-bar, shake, float-up)
T008.description: Create game.css with styles for HUD, challenge area, feedback overlay, keyboard highlights (target/correct/wrong/pressed), start/game-over screens, and animations (pulse, flash-bar, shake, float-up)

T010.name: Create game.js with game state management, game loop (startGame, nextChord, levelUp, gameOver), timer system, input handling (MIDI/QWERTY/mouse), chord checking with pitch class matching, scoring with combo multiplier and time bonus, lives system, and UI updates
T010.description: Create game.js with game state management, game loop (startGame, nextChord, levelUp, gameOver), timer system, input handling (MIDI/QWERTY/mouse), chord checking with pitch class matching, scoring with combo multiplier and time bonus, lives system, and UI updates

T011.name: Test manually in browser - verify start screen, MIDI detection, difficulty selection, chord display, timer, correct/wrong/timeout feedback, lives, and game over
T011.description: Test manually in browser - verify start screen, MIDI detection, difficulty selection, chord display, timer, correct/wrong/timeout feedback, lives, and game over

T013.name: Add navigation link to index.html - add mode-switch div with link to game.html before closing container div
T013.description: Add navigation link to index.html - add mode-switch div with link to game.html before closing container div

T014.name: Add CSS for mode-switch link to style.css (absolute positioned, bottom, centered, subtle opacity)
T014.description: Add CSS for mode-switch link to style.css (absolute positioned, bottom, centered, subtle opacity)

T016.name: Add feedback synths to game.js init() - create correctSynth (sine, ascending C5-E5-G5) and incorrectSynth (sawtooth, low E2) using Tone.js
T016.description: Add feedback synths to game.js init() - create correctSynth (sine, ascending C5-E5-G5) and incorrectSynth (sawtooth, low E2) using Tone.js

T017.name: Call feedback sounds in onCorrect(), onIncorrect(), and onTimeout()
T017.description: Call feedback sounds in onCorrect(), onIncorrect(), and onTimeout()

T019.name: Add progression mode toggle checkbox to game.html in the level-select div
T019.description: Add progression mode toggle checkbox to game.html in the level-select div

T020.name: Add progression logic to game.js - read toggle in startGame(), replace chord selection in nextChord() to use progression sequences when enabled
T020.description: Add progression logic to game.js - read toggle in startGame(), replace chord selection in nextChord() to use progression sequences when enabled

T022.name: Handle sustain pedal (MIDI CC 64) - clear held notes when sustain pedal is released to prevent stuck notes
T022.description: Handle sustain pedal (MIDI CC 64) - clear held notes when sustain pedal is released to prevent stuck notes

T023.name: Prevent duplicate incorrect triggers - add cooldown flag so onIncorrect() can't fire multiple times per chord (1200ms cooldown)
T023.description: Prevent duplicate incorrect triggers - add cooldown flag so onIncorrect() can't fire multiple times per chord (1200ms cooldown)

T024.name: Add 'hear chord again' button to game.html challenge area and wire up click handler in game.js to replay target chord
T024.description: Add 'hear chord again' button to game.html challenge area and wire up click handler in game.js to replay target chord

T025.name: Commit polish and edge case fixes
T025.description: Commit polish and edge case fixes

T026.name: Final integration test - verify all 17 acceptance criteria in browser with MIDI keyboard
T026.description: Final integration test - verify all 17 acceptance criteria in browser with MIDI keyboard

test_commands.command: echo 'Manual browser test required: open neural-arpeggiator/src/game.html in Chrome with MIDI keyboard'
